def positive_mutable_default_argument_leaks_state_across_calls():
    rule_id = "mutable_default_argument_leaks_state_across_calls"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag function signatures that use mutable defaults such as [], {}, or set() and allow state sharing between calls."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
